steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content: Tangent $\perp$ radius at the point of tangency. Radius from center $(-1,1)$ to point $(7,-6)$ has slope $\frac{-6-1}{7-(-1)} = \frac{-7}{8}$. Tangent slope = negative reciprocal = $\frac{8}{7}$.

steps.title: Backsolve: test choice C
steps.content: Plug $(14, 2)$ in: $\frac{8}{7}(14) - 14 = 16 - 14 = 2$ ✓. That matches choice C — C is correct.
